revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 14 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 14 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月14日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[文久]]3年（[[1863年]]_月_日） - 横浜で日本初の英字日刊紙『The Daily Japan Herald』が創刊 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]_月_日） - [[琉球]]の尚泰国王を「琉球藩王」とし、[[華族]]に列する
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[万寿]]4年（[[1027年]]_月_日） - [[藤原妍子]]、[[中宮]]・[[藤原道長]]の子（* [[994年]]） * [[天正]]18年（[[1590年]]_月_日） - [[狩野永徳]]、[[日本画家]]（* [[1543年]]） * [[寛永]]20年（[[1643年]]_月_日） - [[春日局]]、[[徳川家光]]の乳母（* [[1579年]]） * [[延宝]]6年（[[1678年]]_月_日） - [[徳川綱重]]、甲府藩主徳川家光の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（* [[1644年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月13日 (旧暦)|9月13日]] 翌日[[9月15日 (旧暦)|9月15日]] - 前月[[8月14日 (旧暦)|8月14日]] 翌月[[10月14日 (旧暦)|10月14日]] *新暦[[9月14日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{stub}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月14日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[10月26日]]） - 横浜で日本初の英字[[新聞|日刊紙]]『The Daily Japan Herald』が創刊 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月16日]]） - [[琉球王国|琉球]]の尚泰国王を「琉球藩王」とし、[[華族]]に列する
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[10月9日]]） - [[松本楓湖]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1923年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天暦]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[954年]][[10月13日]]） - [[重明親王]]、[[醍醐天皇]]の第4皇子（* [[906年]]） * [[万寿]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1027年]][[10月16日]]） - [[藤原妍子]]、[[三条天皇]]の[[中宮]]・[[藤原道長]]の子（* [[994年]]） * [[応永]]12年（ユリウス暦[[1405年]][[10月7日]]） - [[伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)]]、[[武将]]（* [[1353年]]） <!---* [[天正]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1590年]][[10月12日]]） - [[狩野永徳]]、[[日本画家]]（* [[1543年]]）--- [[狩野永徳]]では"9月4日"と記載 ---> * [[寛永]]20年（グレゴリオ暦[[1643年]][[10月26日]]） - [[春日局]]、[[徳川家光]]の乳母（* [[1579年]]） * [[延宝]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1678年]][[10月29日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、[[甲府藩]]主・徳川家光の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（* [[1644年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[10月9日]]） - [[梅田雲浜]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1815年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.text:
'''September 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 14'''<!--Lunar September14--> is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[10月26日]]） - 横浜で日本初の英字[[新聞|日刊紙]]『The Daily Japan Herald』が創刊 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月16日]]） - [[琉球王国|琉球]]の尚泰国王を「琉球藩王」とし、[[華族]]に列する
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[10月9日]]） - [[松本楓湖]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1923年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天暦]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[954年]][[10月13日]]） - [[重明親王]]、[[醍醐天皇]]の第4皇子（* [[906年]]） * [[万寿]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1027年]][[10月16日]]） - [[藤原妍子]]、[[三条天皇]]の[[中宮]]・[[藤原道長]]の子（* [[994年]]） * [[応永]]12年（ユリウス暦[[1405年]][[10月7日]]） - [[伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)]]、[[武将]]（* [[1353年]]） <!---* [[天正]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1590年]][[10月12日]]） - [[狩野永徳]]、[[日本画家]]（* [[1543年]]）--- [[狩野永徳]]では"9月4日"と記載 ---> * [[寛永]]20年（グレゴリオ暦[[1643年]][[10月26日]]） - [[春日局]]、[[徳川家光]]の乳母（* [[1579年]]） * [[延宝]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1678年]][[10月29日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、[[甲府藩]]主・徳川家光の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（* [[1644年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[10月9日]]） - [[梅田雲浜]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1815年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

'''September 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 14'''<!--Lunar September14--> is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== Events == * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[10月26日]]） - 横浜で日本初の英字[[新聞|日刊紙]]『The Daily Japan Herald』が創刊 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[10月16日]]） - [[琉球王国|琉球]]の尚泰国王を「琉球藩王」とし、[[華族]]に列する
== Births == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[10月9日]]） - [[松本楓湖]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1923年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天暦]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[954年]][[10月13日]]） - [[重明親王]]、[[醍醐天皇]]の第4皇子（* [[906年]]） * [[万寿]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1027年]][[10月16日]]） - [[藤原妍子]]、[[三条天皇]]の[[中宮]]・[[藤原道長]]の子（* [[994年]]） * [[応永]]12年（ユリウス暦[[1405年]][[10月7日]]） - [[伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)]]、[[武将]]（* [[1353年]]） <!---* [[天正]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1590年]][[10月12日]]） - [[狩野永徳]]、[[日本画家]]（* [[1543年]]）--- [[狩野永徳]]では"9月4日"と記載 ---> * [[寛永]]20年（グレゴリオ暦[[1643年]][[10月26日]]） - [[春日局]]、[[徳川家光]]の乳母（* [[1579年]]） * [[延宝]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1678年]][[10月29日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、[[甲府藩]]主・徳川家光の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（* [[1644年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[10月9日]]） - [[梅田雲浜]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1815年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914}}

== Births == * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[10月9日]]） - [[松本楓湖]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1923年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天暦]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[954年]][[10月13日]]） - [[重明親王]]、[[醍醐天皇]]の第4皇子（* [[906年]]） * [[万寿]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1027年]][[10月16日]]） - [[藤原妍子]]、[[三条天皇]]の[[中宮]]・[[藤原道長]]の子（* [[994年]]） * [[応永]]12年（ユリウス暦[[1405年]][[10月7日]]） - [[伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)]]、[[武将]]（* [[1353年]]） <!---* [[天正]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1590年]][[10月12日]]） - [[狩野永徳]]、[[日本画家]]（* [[1543年]]）--- [[狩野永徳]]では"9月4日"と記載 ---> * [[寛永]]20年（グレゴリオ暦[[1643年]][[10月26日]]） - [[春日局]]、[[徳川家光]]の乳母（* [[1579年]]） * [[延宝]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1678年]][[10月29日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、[[甲府藩]]主・徳川家光の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（* [[1644年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[10月9日]]） - [[梅田雲浜]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1815年]]）

== Deaths == * [[天暦]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[954年]][[10月13日]]） - [[重明親王]]、[[醍醐天皇]]の第4皇子（* [[906年]]） * [[万寿]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1027年]][[10月16日]]） - [[藤原妍子]]、[[三条天皇]]の[[中宮]]・[[藤原道長]]の子（* [[994年]]） * [[応永]]12年（ユリウス暦[[1405年]][[10月7日]]） - [[伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)]]、[[武将]]（* [[1353年]]） <!---* [[天正]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1590年]][[10月12日]]） - [[狩野永徳]]、[[日本画家]]（* [[1543年]]）--- [[狩野永徳]]では"9月4日"と記載 ---> * [[寛永]]20年（グレゴリオ暦[[1643年]][[10月26日]]） - [[春日局]]、[[徳川家光]]の乳母（* [[1579年]]） * [[延宝]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1678年]][[10月29日]]） - [[徳川綱重]]、[[甲府藩]]主・徳川家光の三男・[[徳川家宣]]の父（* [[1644年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[10月9日]]） - [[梅田雲浜]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1815年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914}}

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]] [[Category:Days 14 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:September 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:new pages]]

revision.text:
[[sn:September 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] [[zh:九月十四]] [[en:draft:September 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰}}, King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国}}, is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖}}, a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|954|ja|954年}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王}}, the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年}}).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子}}, {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994年}}).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|応永}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405年}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}}) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)}}, a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}}).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}}, the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}}).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}}, Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}}, third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}}, and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644年}}).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜}}, a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815年}}).
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:文久3年の出来事]]

[[sn:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] [[zh:九月十四]] [[en:draft:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|画家}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|954|ja|954年}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994年}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405年}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644年}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815年}} ).

[[sn:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] [[zh:九月十四]] [[en:draft:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|954|ja|954年}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994年}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405年}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644年}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815年}} ).
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[ja:文久3年の出来事]] == See Also ==

[[sn:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] [[zh:九月十四]] [[en:draft:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|954|ja|954年}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027年}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994年}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405年}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579年}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644年}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815年}} ).

* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year }} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year }} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year }} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year }} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year }} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year }} ).

[[sn:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] [[zh:九月十四]] [[en:draft:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year }} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year }} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year }} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year }} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year }} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year }} ).
[[Category:Historical events in Japan]] [[Category:Japanese samurai]] [[Category:Japanese scholars]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Meiji period]] [[ja:文久3rd year の出来事]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year }} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year }} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year }} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year }} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year }} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year }} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year }} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year }} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=draft|12=draft}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|12=draft|12=draft}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|12=draft|12=draft}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=draft|12=draft}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|12=draft|12=draft}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|12=draft|12=draft}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=draft|12=draft}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|12=draft|12=draft}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|12=draft|12=draft}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==

* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=draft|12=draft}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|12=draft|12=draft}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|12=draft|12=draft}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=draft|12=draft}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|12=draft|12=draft}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|12=draft|12=draft}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=draft|12=draft}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|12=draft|12=draft}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|12=draft|12=draft}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914}}

[[Category:pages to sort]][[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-yue:九月十四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Japanese nobility).

[[sn:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 14일]] [[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:九月十四]] [[en:draft:September 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:文久3rd year の出来事]] [[sn:eptember 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:September 14 (Lunisolar)]]

[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:September 14 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:September 14 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:September 14 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:September 14 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:September 14 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:September 14 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:九月十四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914}}

revision.text:
{{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).

qq-September 14 (Lunisolar)-qq {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== See Also ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==

* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei (era)|ja|安政|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1815|ja|1815th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunkyū (era)|qq=}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 26|qq=}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji (era)|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji era|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1872|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 16|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryukyu Kingdom|qq=}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazoku|qq=}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpō (era)|qq=}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 9|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/painter|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923|qq=}} ).

* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenryaku (era)|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|954|ja|954th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/954|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 13|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|qq=}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Daigo|qq=}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/906|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manju (era)|qq=}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1027|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 16|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Genshi|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|qq=}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Sanjō|qq=}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/994|qq=}} ).

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunkyū (era)|qq=}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 26|qq=}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji (era)|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji era|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1872|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 16|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryukyu Kingdom|qq=}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazoku|qq=}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpō (era)|qq=}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 9|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/painter|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923|qq=}} ).

* {{ill|Manju (era)|ja|万寿|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manju (era)|qq=}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|ja|1027年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1027|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 16|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Genshi|ja|藤原妍子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Genshi|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|qq=}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|ja|三条天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Sanjō|qq=}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=}} (* {{ill|994|ja|994年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/994|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|qq=}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|ja|1405年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1405|qq=}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 7|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=}} (* {{ill|1353|ja|1353年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1353|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ei (era)|qq=}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|ja|1643年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1643|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 26|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Kasuga no Tsubone|ja|春日局|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Tsubone|qq=}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Iemitsu|qq=}} (* {{ill|1579|ja|1579年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1579|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō (era)|ja|延宝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enpō (era)|qq=}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|ja|1678年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1678|qq=}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 29|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|ja|徳川綱重|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunashige|qq=}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|ja|甲府藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōfu Domain|qq=}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|ja|徳川家光|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Iemitsu|qq=}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|ja|徳川家宣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ienobu|qq=}} (* {{ill|1644|ja|1644年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1644|qq=}} ).

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū (era)|ja|文久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunkyū (era)|qq=}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1863|ja|1863年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1863|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 26|qq=}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji (era)|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji era|qq=}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1872|qq=}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 16|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|ja|琉球王国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryukyu Kingdom|qq=}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazoku|qq=}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpō (era)|qq=}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|ja|1840年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 9|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|painter|ja|Painter|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/painter|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1923|ja|1923年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923|qq=}} ).

* {{ill|Tenryaku (era)|ja|天暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenryaku (era)|qq=}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|954|ja|954年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/954|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 13|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|qq=}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|ja|醍醐天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Daigo|qq=}} (* {{ill|906|ja|906年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/906|qq=}} ).

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
