Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|qq=}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|qq=}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|qq=}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|September 14|qq=September 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|qq=}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|qq=}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|qq=}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|qq=}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).

* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).

* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|qq=|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|qq=|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|qq=|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).

* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).

* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|qq=|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|qq=|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|qq=|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|qq=|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|qq=|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|qq=|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|qq=|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|qq=|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|qq=|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840172]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 14|qq=September 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840172]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 14|qq=September 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|13|9|15|8|14|10|9|0914|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840172]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 14|qq=September 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 11 (Gregorian [[:en:1840|1840]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese [[:en:Corel Painter|painter]] (+ [[:en:1923|1923]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Tenryaku|Tenryaku (era)]] 8 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:954|954]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Daigo|Emperor Daigo]] (* [[:en:906|906]] ).
* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian [[:en:1405|1405]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1353|1353]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei (era)]] 20 (Gregorian [[:en:1643|1643]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Lady Kasuga|Kasuga no Tsubone]] , the wet nurse of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] (* [[:en:1579|1579]] ).
* [[:en:Enpō|Enpō (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1678|1678]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Tsunashige|Tokugawa Tsunashige]] , Lord of [[:en:Kōfu Domain|Kōfu Domain]] , third son of [[:en:Tokugawa Iemitsu|Tokugawa Iemitsu]] , and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Ienobu|Tokugawa Ienobu]] (* [[:en:1644|1644]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).

* [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of [[:en:Ryukyu Kingdom|Ryukyu Kingdom]] , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]] (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==

* [[:en:Manju (era)|Manju (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1027|1027]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Genshi]] , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:994|994]] ).

* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei (era)]] 6 (Gregorian [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* [[:en:1815|1815]] ).

* {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|WD=Q1194155|lt=Manju (era)}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|en|1027|WD=Q19271|lt=1027}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|en|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|WD=Q5507521|lt=Fujiwara no Genshi}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|WD=Q357231|lt=Emperor Sanjō}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* {{ill|994|en|994|WD=Q24114|lt=994}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|en|1405|WD=Q6124|lt=1405}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1353|en|1353|WD=Q6116|lt=1353}} ).

* {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō (era)}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|en|Tokugawa Tsunashige|WD=Q7004484|lt=Tokugawa Tsunashige}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|en|Kōfu Domain|WD=Q661116|lt=Kōfu Domain}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|en|Tokugawa Ienobu|WD=Q366734|lt=Tokugawa Ienobu}} (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}} ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840172]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 14|qq=September 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū (era)}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|WD=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|en|Kazoku|WD=Q241734|lt=Kazoku}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō (era)}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese {{ill|Corel Painter|en|Corel Painter|WD=Q1070296|lt=painter}} (+ {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku (era)}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|954|en|954|WD=Q23851|lt=954}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo}} (* {{ill|906|en|906|WD=Q24875|lt=906}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|WD=Q1194155|lt=Manju (era)}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|en|1027|WD=Q19271|lt=1027}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|en|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|WD=Q5507521|lt=Fujiwara no Genshi}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|WD=Q357231|lt=Emperor Sanjō}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* {{ill|994|en|994|WD=Q24114|lt=994}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|en|1405|WD=Q6124|lt=1405}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1353|en|1353|WD=Q6116|lt=1353}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei (era)}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|en|1643|WD=Q6917|lt=1643}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} ) – {{ill|Lady Kasuga|en|Lady Kasuga|WD=Q835747|lt=Kasuga no Tsubone}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} (* {{ill|1579|en|1579|WD=Q6709|lt=1579}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō (era)}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|en|Tokugawa Tsunashige|WD=Q7004484|lt=Tokugawa Tsunashige}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|en|Kōfu Domain|WD=Q661116|lt=Kōfu Domain}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|en|Tokugawa Ienobu|WD=Q366734|lt=Tokugawa Ienobu}} (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei (era)}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}} ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十四]][[zh:九月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 14|qq=September 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū (era)}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|WD=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|en|Kazoku|WD=Q241734|lt=Kazoku}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō (era)}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese {{ill|Corel Painter|en|Corel Painter|WD=Q1070296|lt=painter}} (+ {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku (era)}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|954|en|954|WD=Q23851|lt=954}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo}} (* {{ill|906|en|906|WD=Q24875|lt=906}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|WD=Q1194155|lt=Manju (era)}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|en|1027|WD=Q19271|lt=1027}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|en|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|WD=Q5507521|lt=Fujiwara no Genshi}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|WD=Q357231|lt=Emperor Sanjō}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* {{ill|994|en|994|WD=Q24114|lt=994}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|en|1405|WD=Q6124|lt=1405}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1353|en|1353|WD=Q6116|lt=1353}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei (era)}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|en|1643|WD=Q6917|lt=1643}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} ) – {{ill|Lady Kasuga|en|Lady Kasuga|WD=Q835747|lt=Kasuga no Tsubone}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} (* {{ill|1579|en|1579|WD=Q6709|lt=1579}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō (era)}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|en|Tokugawa Tsunashige|WD=Q7004484|lt=Tokugawa Tsunashige}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|en|Kōfu Domain|WD=Q661116|lt=Kōfu Domain}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|en|Tokugawa Ienobu|WD=Q366734|lt=Tokugawa Ienobu}} (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei (era)}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū (era)|1=Bunkyū}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26|1=October 26}} ) – Japan’s first English-language daily newspaper, *The Daily Japan Herald*, is launched in Yokohama.
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16|1=October 16}} ) – {{ill|Shō Tai|ja|尚泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Tai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 尚泰王|1=Shō Tai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1372454}} , King of {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|WD=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom|1=Ryukyu Kingdom}} , is officially designated as the "Ryukyu Domain King" and Ranked among the {{ill|Kazoku|en|Kazoku|WD=Q241734|lt=Kazoku|1=Kazoku}} (Japanese nobility).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō (era)|1=Tenpō}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9|1=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese {{ill|Corel Painter|en|Corel Painter|WD=Q1070296|lt=painter|1=Corel Painter}} (+ {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923|1=1923}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku (era)|1=Tenryaku}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|954|en|954|WD=Q23851|lt=954|1=954}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo|1=Emperor Daigo}} (* {{ill|906|en|906|WD=Q24875|lt=906|1=906}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|WD=Q1194155|lt=Manju (era)|1=Manju (era)}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|en|1027|WD=Q19271|lt=1027|1=1027}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16|1=October 16}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|en|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|WD=Q5507521|lt=Fujiwara no Genshi|1=Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|WD=Q357231|lt=Emperor Sanjō|1=Emperor Sanjō}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* {{ill|994|en|994|WD=Q24114|lt=994|1=994}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|en|1405|WD=Q6124|lt=1405|1=1405}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1353|en|1353|WD=Q6116|lt=1353|1=1353}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei (era)|1=Kan'ei}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|en|1643|WD=Q6917|lt=1643|1=1643}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26|1=October 26}} ) – {{ill|Lady Kasuga|en|Lady Kasuga|WD=Q835747|lt=Kasuga no Tsubone|1=Lady Kasuga}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} (* {{ill|1579|en|1579|WD=Q6709|lt=1579|1=1579}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō (era)|1=Enpō}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678|1=1678}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29|1=October 29}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|en|Tokugawa Tsunashige|WD=Q7004484|lt=Tokugawa Tsunashige|1=Tokugawa Tsunashige}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|en|Kōfu Domain|WD=Q661116|lt=Kōfu Domain|1=Kōfu Domain}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|en|Tokugawa Ienobu|WD=Q366734|lt=Tokugawa Ienobu|1=Tokugawa Ienobu}} (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644|1=1644}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei (era)|1=Ansei}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9|1=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Umeda Unpin|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unpin|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6561334}} , a {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (* {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}} ).

* {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō (era)|1=Tenpō}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9|1=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Matsumoto Fūko|ja|松本楓湖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumoto Fūko|1=Matsumoto Fūko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11531144}} , a Japanese {{ill|Corel Painter|en|Corel Painter|WD=Q1070296|lt=painter|1=Corel Painter}} (+ {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923|1=1923}} ).

* {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|WD=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku (era)|1=Tenryaku}} 8 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|954|en|954|WD=Q23851|lt=954|1=954}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}} ) – {{ill|Imperial Prince Shigeaki|ja|重明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince Shigeaki|1=Shigeakira-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644772}} , the fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|WD=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo|1=Emperor Daigo}} (* {{ill|906|en|906|WD=Q24875|lt=906|1=906}} ).
* {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|WD=Q1194155|lt=Manju (era)|1=Manju (era)}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1027|en|1027|WD=Q19271|lt=1027|1=1027}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16|1=October 16}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|en|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|WD=Q5507521|lt=Fujiwara no Genshi|1=Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)}} , {{ill|Empress Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|WD=Q357231|lt=Emperor Sanjō|1=Emperor Sanjō}} and daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* {{ill|994|en|994|WD=Q24114|lt=994|1=994}} ).
* {{ill|Ōei (era)|ja|Ōei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1405|en|1405|WD=Q6124|lt=1405|1=1405}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}} ) – {{ill|Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|ja|伊達政宗 (大膳大夫)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Date Masamune (Dai Zen Daibu)|1=Date Masamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10885149}} , a Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1353|en|1353|WD=Q6116|lt=1353|1=1353}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei (era)|1=Kan'ei}} 20 (Gregorian {{ill|1643|en|1643|WD=Q6917|lt=1643|1=1643}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26|1=October 26}} ) – {{ill|Lady Kasuga|en|Lady Kasuga|WD=Q835747|lt=Kasuga no Tsubone|1=Lady Kasuga}} , the wet nurse of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} (* {{ill|1579|en|1579|WD=Q6709|lt=1579|1=1579}} ).
* {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Enpō (era)|1=Enpō}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1678|en|1678|WD=Q7634|lt=1678|1=1678}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29|1=October 29}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashige|en|Tokugawa Tsunashige|WD=Q7004484|lt=Tokugawa Tsunashige|1=Tokugawa Tsunashige}} , Lord of {{ill|Kōfu Domain|en|Kōfu Domain|WD=Q661116|lt=Kōfu Domain|1=Kōfu Domain}} , third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|WD=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|en|Tokugawa Ienobu|WD=Q366734|lt=Tokugawa Ienobu|1=Tokugawa Ienobu}} (* {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644|1=1644}} ).
